abstract: Bidirectionally bind a Multica agent to a DingTalk document knowledge base. Forward (DingTalk -> Multica): actively sync core definitions -- entry AGENTS.md into instructions, each skills/<name>/ into a mounted Multica skill, the dws base skill mounted by default, the KB root written to the agent env -- with read-back verify and a completion quality-check. Reverse (Multica -> DingTalk): losslessly write edits back through DingTalk's own Markdown parser (JSONML render + de-ratchet + optimistic-lock revision + read-back). Dynamic data (memories/storage) is intentionally out of scope, left to DWS runtime hydration in phase two.
